agent_instructions: You are pointed at the hermes-setup repo. To set up a Hermes agent from it: (1) present the `profiles` list to the user — each entry's `name`, `kind`, and `description` (`kind: base`, e.g. general, is the recommended general-purpose default; `locale` is a region base; `persona` is specialized); (2) ask which `name` they want; (3a) IF you are already running inside a local clone of this repo, run that profile's `local_install_command`; (3b) OTHERWISE run its `standalone_posix_command` (macOS/Linux) or `standalone_windows_command` (Windows), first replacing <RAW_REPO_URL> and <REPO_GIT_URL> with the raw-content and git URLs of THIS repo (derive them from the link you were given). NEVER run `hermes profile install` against a repo-subdirectory URL — it only accepts a repo ROOT or a LOCAL folder, and the standalone command creates that local clone for you. After install, open the profile (`hermes -p <name>`) and run `/finish-setup`.

install.note: hermes profile install cannot target a subdirectory of a git repo (it clones the URL root and requires distribution.yaml there). Install from a LOCAL clone: from inside a checkout run a profile's local_install_command; standalone, run its standalone_posix_command / standalone_windows_command (which clone the repo for you). See each profile entry.

profiles.description: Software-developer agent — TDD, PR workflow, code review, terminal, on the free chain.
